title: Digital Transformation for Managers
summary: Lead change and innovation in the digital era.
description: A management course on digital strategy, operating-model transformation, technology choices, organisational change and value delivery.
audience: Managers, technical leaders, consultants and graduate students responsible for digital change.
prerequisites: Professional or academic exposure to organisational processes is helpful.
outcomes: Assess digital pressures and strategic opportunities.
Define a transformation ambition and portfolio of initiatives.
Plan governance, change and capability development.

modules.title: Digital strategy and competitive change
modules.description: Business models, ecosystems and strategic priorities.

modules.title: Technology and operating-model choices
modules.description: Platforms, architecture, sourcing and ways of working.
